title: HaWare 3lb Loaf Tin, Stainless Steel Large Bread Baking Pan for Banana Bread/Cake/Loaves/Lasagna, 31 x 13 x 7.5 cm, Healthy & Durable, Oven & Dishwasher Safe - Set of 2
features: ENJOY HEALTHIER LIFE: HaWare deep loaf tin is made of high quality stainless steel, No coating and no need to worry about harmful substances peeling off into the food during high temperatures, Far superior than aluminum loaf pan, Ensure absolute safety and health

DURABLE & NON-WARP: Come with proper thickness and solid construction, Extra heavy-duty allows it to heat evenly in use and never deform, Rust-free and durable for years, Unbreakable and anti-deformation will withstand the test of time in your kitchen

WORKMANSHIP: One-piece construction fully contain the batter and leak proof, 7.5cm deep side helps make a nice fluffy cake and keep the sauce from spilling all over, Smooth rolled edges without sharp spots to grip comfortably and transfer easily

EASY CLEANUP: Matte finished is conducive to stain resistance and always stay shiny, Smooth flat surface release baked foods effortlessly, Rounded design has no dead angle to reduce food accumulation, Easy to clean by hands and dishwasher safe to save your time(Recommend to use parchment paper on the bottom to prevent sticking and easy cleanup.)

GOOD VALUE 2 PIECES: Measures 31 x 13 x 7.5cm, Larger than regular sized bread pan, Stackable and saves you space, 2 Pcs in a set could help you efficiently complete 2 different flavor of breads at a time, Great for making coffee cake/banana bread/zucchini /meatloaf/ toast/ ice cream for family or friends on any occasion, Can also be used as roasting lasagna, meat, veggies, Freeze safe and used as ice cream pan
